title: Selective Hearing Champion - Funny Relatable Sarcastic Humor Tee for Everyday Hilarity
description:
Are you a pro at tuning out the noise you don't want? Congratulations, you're now the official Selective Hearing Champion! This design is a hilarious nod to anyone who's perfected the art of ignoring what they don’t care about — intentionally or not. Whether it's kids shouting 'Mom!' for the millionth time, your boss asking for that 'urgent' spreadsheet, or another unsolicited life hack from your chatty neighbor, this is your unapologetic badge of honor. 

Perfect for:
- Parents dealing with a constant chorus of 'Mom! Dad! MOM!' calls.
- Folks who find selective hearing is their primary survival skill.
- Gifting to anyone with a great sense of humor and a zero-tolerance policy for nonsense.

DETAILS:
- Bold typography reads: 'Selective Hearing Champion' with fun sarcastic energy.
- Clean graphic style, designed to stand out on all colors.
- Perfect fit across light and dark apparel options, made-to-order just for you.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
